selected_meals.name: Lentil Spinach Curry Bowls
selected_meals.taste_upgrade: Bloom curry powder + cumin in oil, finish with lemon and cilantro.

selected_meals.name: Egg White Veggie Muffins + Fruit
selected_meals.taste_upgrade: Sauté veggies first and add feta/chili flakes for stronger flavor.

selected_meals.name: Shrimp Zucchini Skillet with Quinoa
selected_meals.taste_upgrade: Marinate shrimp 10 min with lemon, paprika, garlic, then finish with parsley.

selected_meals.name: Greek Yogurt Overnight Oats
selected_meals.taste_upgrade: Use pinch of salt + cinnamon + vanilla; add toasted nuts at serving time.

selected_meals.name: Tofu Veggie Stir-Fry + Brown Rice
selected_meals.taste_upgrade: Pan-sear tofu hard, then glaze with soy-ginger-garlic and chili crisp.

prep_steps: Cook base grains/legumes first (rice, quinoa, lentils, beans).
Chop and roast/sauté all vegetables in one batch (leave crunchy salad veg raw).
Mix two bold sauces (example: lemon-herb yogurt + chipotle-lime) for variety.
Cook proteins (tofu/egg whites/shrimp) and portion by meal.
Prep daily protein snacks (yogurt/cottage-cheese cups, hummus + veg) to close macro gaps.
Assemble grab-and-go containers for Mon-Wed; freeze Thu-Sun portions as needed.
Reserve quick rescue meals for busiest days: Shrimp Zucchini Skillet with Quinoa.
fallback_swaps: No spinach -> use kale or romaine in bowls/salads.
No quinoa -> use brown rice or farro.
No shrimp -> use tofu or extra chickpeas.
No greek yogurt -> use cottage cheese or skyr.
No bell pepper -> use zucchini or broccoli.
Low flavor? Add acid (lemon/lime/vinegar), salt, and chili before adding extra oil.

weekly_sauce_rotation.name: Lemon-Herb Yogurt Sauce
weekly_sauce_rotation.formula: Greek yogurt + lemon juice/zest + garlic + salt + dill/parsley

weekly_sauce_rotation.name: Chipotle-Lime Sauce
weekly_sauce_rotation.formula: Greek yogurt or light mayo + chipotle + lime + cumin + pinch honey

finishers: Acid: lemon/lime juice or red wine vinegar at the end
Heat: chili flakes, chili crisp, or jalapeño
Crunch: toasted nuts/seeds or crispy chickpeas
Creamy contrast: yogurt sauce, feta, tahini, or hummus drizzle

meal_upgrades.taste_upgrade: Bloom curry powder + cumin in oil, finish with lemon and cilantro.
Sauté veggies first and add feta/chili flakes for stronger flavor.
Marinate shrimp 10 min with lemon, paprika, garlic, then finish with parsley.
Use pinch of salt + cinnamon + vanilla; add toasted nuts at serving time.
Pan-sear tofu hard, then glaze with soy-ginger-garlic and chili crisp.

validation_hints: No major flags from heuristic checks.
